req.title: Account statement generation (negative variant)
req.statement: A customer shall request monthly statements as PDF; statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage. Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits) must be tested.

doc.reasoning: The requirement covers PDF statement delivery, cold-storage retrieval for records older than 7 years, retrieval logging, and several error paths (404 for inactive periods, 503 for cold-storage failures, 401 for unauthorised callers). Test design uses: EP for the happy-path (valid authenticated owner gets a recent statement); NEG for the unauthorised-caller case (different account owner); BVA for the 7-year boundary (statement exactly 84 months ago triggers cold-storage path); DT for combined error conditions (no activity + valid auth → 404); STC for the cold-storage unavailability state (service degraded → 503). Each test is self-contained via pytest fixtures and stubs, deterministic through mocked dependencies, and idempotent because no persistent state is mutated.

tests.name: test_get_recent_statement_returns_pdf_and_logs_retrieval
preconditions: Authenticated customer token belongs to account owner
Statement for target month exists in hot storage
Month is within the last 7 years
actions: GET /statements/{month} with a valid recent month (e.g. 2024-06)
expected: Response body is non-empty binary PDF data
Audit log contains a retrieval entry for the requested month
tests.executable:
def test_get_recent_statement_returns_pdf_and_logs_retrieval(
    auth_token_owner, api_client, audit_log_spy, statement_month_recent
):
    resp = api_client.get(
        f"/statements/{statement_month_recent}",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_owner}"},
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert len(resp.content) > 0
    assert resp.content[:4] == b"%PDF"
    log_entry = audit_log_spy.last_entry()
    assert log_entry["action"] == "statement_retrieved"
    assert log_entry["month"] == statement_month_recent

tests.name: test_get_statement_as_non_owner_returns_401
preconditions: Token belongs to a different account holder (not the resource owner)
Target account has a statement for the requested month
actions: GET /statements/{month} for the target account owner's month
expected: Response body contains error code UNAUTHORIZED or similar
No retrieval audit log entry created for this request
tests.executable:
def test_get_statement_as_non_owner_returns_401(
    auth_token_non_owner, api_client, audit_log_spy, statement_month_recent
):
    resp = api_client.get(
        f"/statements/{statement_month_recent}",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_non_owner}"},
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 401
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error") in ("UNAUTHORIZED", "Unauthorized", "unauthorized")
    assert "Content-Type" not in resp.headers or resp.headers.get(
        "Content-Type"
    ) != "application/pdf"
    assert audit_log_spy.count_entries(action="statement_retrieved") == 0

tests.name: test_get_statement_exactly_seven_years_ago_uses_cold_storage
preconditions: Authenticated token belongs to account owner
Statement for the month exactly 84 months (7 years) prior to today exists in cold storage
actions: Compute month that is exactly 84 months before the current month
expected: Response body begins with PDF magic bytes
Cold-storage access log records one read for the boundary month
trace: R-FIN-058: statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage
tests.executable:
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_get_statement_exactly_seven_years_ago_uses_cold_storage(
    auth_token_owner, api_client, cold_storage_spy, audit_log_spy
):
    boundary_month = (date.today() - relativedelta(months=84)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    resp = api_client.get(
        f"/statements/{boundary_month}",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_owner}"},
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert resp.content[:4] == b"%PDF"
    assert cold_storage_spy.read_count(month=boundary_month) == 1
    log_entry = audit_log_spy.last_entry()
    assert log_entry["action"] == "statement_retrieved"
    assert log_entry["month"] == boundary_month

tests.name: test_get_statement_for_inactive_month_returns_404
preconditions: Authenticated token belongs to account owner
Account has no transaction activity in the requested month
No statement was generated for that month
actions: GET /statements/{month} for a month with no account activity
expected: Response body contains error code NO_ACTIVITY or NOT_FOUND
trace: R-FIN-058: error pathway – 404 if no activity in period
tests.executable:
def test_get_statement_for_inactive_month_returns_404(
    auth_token_owner, api_client, inactive_month
):
    resp = api_client.get(
        f"/statements/{inactive_month}",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_owner}"},
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 404
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("error") in ("NO_ACTIVITY", "NOT_FOUND", "Not Found")
    assert resp.headers.get("Content-Type") != "application/pdf"

tests.name: test_get_old_statement_when_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503
preconditions: Authenticated token belongs to account owner
Requested month is older than 7 years (cold storage required)
Cold storage service is in a degraded / unavailable state (simulated via stub)
actions: Configure cold-storage stub to return a service-unavailable error
Compute a month older than 84 months
expected: Response body indicates cold storage unavailability
trace: R-FIN-058: error pathway – 503 if cold storage unavailable
R-FIN-058: statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage
tests.executable:
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_get_old_statement_when_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503(
    auth_token_owner, api_client, cold_storage_stub
):
    cold_storage_stub.set_unavailable(True)
    old_month = (date.today() - relativedelta(months=90)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    try:
        resp = api_client.get(
            f"/statements/{old_month}",
            headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token_owner}"},
        )
        assert resp.status_code == 503
        body = resp.json()
        assert body.get("error") in (
            "COLD_STORAGE_UNAVAILABLE", "Service Unavailable", "503"
        )
        assert resp.headers.get("Content-Type") != "application/pdf"
    finally:
        cold_storage_stub.set_unavailable(False)
